reported_status: All required local gates now pass individually, but the final `bun run verify` report remains policy-non-green because live-provider-checks are escalated and were not executed in PR mode. The implementation work is complete; only maintainer-authorized live validation or waiver remains.

changed_files.summary: Added a focused Vitest case that exercises every provider import/export API wrapper method so the changed-lines coverage gate clears.

bun run check:server.summary: Initial run timed out after 124s with no test failures reported.
Passed on rerun; server suite finished with 1138 passes, 7 skips, 0 failures.

bun run check:desktop.summary: Passed; desktop lint, Vitest, and production build all completed successfully.

bun run check:coverage.summary: Initial run failed; coverage report at artifacts/coverage/2026-06-10T07-58-42-641Z/coverage-report.md showed changed-lines coverage at 33.89% and multiple lane failures.
Passed after adding the provider API coverage test; latest report at artifacts/coverage/2026-06-10T08-12-29-111Z/coverage-report.md shows changed-lines coverage at 90.15%.

bun run check:native.summary: Initial run failed with tauri-build permission denied because repo-owned target binaries were locked.
Passed after stopping the repo-owned lock-holding processes `cc-jiangxia-desktop`, `claude-sidecar`, and `tauri`; cargo check completed successfully.

bun run verify.summary: Final PR quality report at artifacts/quality-runs/2026-06-10T08-25-52-251Z/report.md shows 9 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped, but the run is still marked not ready because live-provider-checks were escalated and not executed in PR mode.

bun run quality:providers.summary: Confirmed available provider selectors: current-runtime, glm:main:glm-main, deepseek:main:deepseek-main, deepseek:haiku:deepseek-haiku, mimo:main:mimo-main, and openai:main:openai-main.

must_preserve_evidence.G-SEC-REDIRECT: Server-owned export tests and service coverage passed; no frontend-only credential security boundary was introduced.
must_preserve_evidence.G-NO-ACTIVE: Final server tests cover active/default non-transfer and passed in check:server.
must_preserve_evidence.G-PREVIEW-COMMIT: Final server and desktop tests cover preview before commit, commit refresh, and side-effect-free preview.
must_preserve_evidence.G-CONFLICT: Final import tests cover conflict defaults and explicit overwrite behavior.
must_preserve_evidence.G-SECRET-EXPORT: Final tests cover separate confirmed credential-bearing export path and non-remembered desktop confirmation.
must_preserve_evidence.G-SCOPE: No .env, credential, user config, or unrelated state files were edited.
must_preserve_evidence.G-TEST: check:server, check:desktop, check:coverage, and all non-live verify lanes passed.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-001: Default export redaction is covered by server tests.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-002: Preview side-effect-free behavior is covered by server tests.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-003: Import active/default non-mutation is covered by server tests.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-004: Conflict default and explicit overwrite behavior are covered by tests.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-005: Generated local IDs are covered by server import tests.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-006: Default export does not rely on frontend masking.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-007: Secret export requires per-request confirmation and is labeled credential-bearing.

blockers.summary: The PR quality gate remains policy-non-green because live-provider-checks are escalated and were not executed in PR mode, even though all executed local lanes passed.
blockers.exact_next_action: Run the live-provider gate in a maintainer-authorized environment with a configured selector, for example `bun run quality:gate --mode baseline --allow-live --provider-model openai:main:openai-main`, or explicitly waive the live-provider-checks lane.
blockers.evidence: artifacts/quality-runs/2026-06-10T08-25-52-251Z/report.md shows `Passed: 9`, `Failed: 0`, `Skipped: 2`, `Blocked by policy: yes`, and `Escalated Checks: live-provider-checks`.
blockers.unblock_criteria: Live-provider-checks complete successfully or a maintainer records an explicit waiver for that lane.

concerns: The latest verify run is not failing on code quality; it is blocked by policy because live-provider-checks were not executed in PR mode.
The worktree remains dirty from pre-existing feature work; unrelated files were not normalized or reverted.
recovery_hints: If a green end-to-end PR gate is required, run the live-provider gate with one of the configured selectors reported by `bun run quality:providers`.
No additional source changes are needed for the current coverage or native issues.
consumer_evidence: Task evidence was consumed by downstream join points and final verification; see implement-tracker completed_checks plus this result validation_output.
